title: panicum notatum
intro: Panicum notatum, also known as switchgrass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Panicum notatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of switchgrass typically involve making tea from its dried leaves or roots, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
